scripts.setup: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); const cmd = p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File start.ps1 setup' : 'bash start.sh setup'; cp.execSync(cmd, { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.setup:full: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync(p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File start.ps1 setup -Mode full' : 'bash start.sh setup --mode full', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.dev: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync(p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File start.ps1' : 'bash start.sh', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.dev:lan: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync(p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File start.ps1 -Lan' : 'bash start.sh --lan', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.build: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync('npm --prefix Codebase/Backend run build', { stdio: 'inherit' }); cp.execSync('npm --prefix Codebase/Frontend run build', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.start: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync(p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File start.ps1 prod' : 'bash start.sh prod', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.start:lan: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync(p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File start.ps1 prod -Lan' : 'bash start.sh prod --lan', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
scripts.prod: node -e "const p = process.platform; const cp = require('child_process'); cp.execSync(p === 'win32' ? 'powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File start.ps1 prod -SkipBuild' : 'bash start.sh prod --skip-build', { stdio: 'inherit' });"
